Layout.code: export default function RootLayout({ children, }: { children: React.ReactNode; }) { return ( <html lang="en"> <body className={inter.className}> <ThemeProvider attribute="class" defaultTheme="dark" enableSystem disableTransitionOnChange > <Navigation /> {children} <Footer /> <Toaster /> </ThemeProvider> </body> </html> ); }

PitchDeckViewer.code:
export default function PitchDeckViewer() { const [currentSlide, setCurrentSlide] = useState(0); const [isFullscreen, setIsFullscreen] = useState(false); const slideCount = 12; // Navigate to previous slide const prevSlide = () => { setCurrentSlide((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : prev)); }; // Navigate to next slide const nextSlide = () => { setCurrentSlide((prev) => (prev < slideCount - 1 ? prev + 1 : prev)); }; // Toggle fullscreen view const toggleFullscreen = () => { setIsFullscreen(!isFullscreen); }; // Handle keyboard navigation useEffect(() => { const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => { if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') prevSlide(); if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') nextSlide(); if (e.key === 'Escape') setIsFullscreen(false); if (e.key === 'f') toggleFullscreen(); }; window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown); return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown); }, [currentSlide]); // Generate slide URL function getSlideUrl(slideNumber: number) { // Format slide number with leading zero for single digits const formattedNumber = String(slideNumber).padStart(2, '0'); return `/pitch-deck/slide-${formattedNumber}.png`; } // Slide content for each slide const slideContent = [ { title: 'PatchLine AI', subtitle: 'Generative AI for Music Creation' }, { title: 'The Problem', subtitle: 'Music creators face significant workflow challenges' }, { title: 'Our Solution', subtitle: 'AI-powered music production assistant' }, { title: 'Market Opportunity', subtitle: '$10B+ global music production market' }, { title: 'Product Demo', subtitle: 'See PatchLine AI in action' }, { title: 'Business Model', subtitle: 'Subscription tiers and enterprise solutions' }, { title: 'Technology', subtitle: 'Our architecture and AI approach' }, { title: 'Competitive Landscape', subtitle: 'How we stand out from alternatives' }, { title: 'Go-to-Market Strategy', subtitle: 'How we'll reach our customers' }, { title: 'Team', subtitle: 'Who we are and why we're the right team' }, { title: 'Roadmap', subtitle: 'Our vision for the next 18 months' }, { title: 'Our Values', subtitle: 'What we stand for' } ]; return (
{/* Keyboard navigation hint */} {/* Slides display */}
{/* Current slide image */}

{slideContent[currentSlide]?.title}

{slideContent[currentSlide]?.subtitle}

{/* Navigation controls */}
{currentSlide + 1} / {slideCount}
); }

))}

); }

ContactAPI.code: import { NextResponse } from 'next/server'; export async function POST(req: Request) { try { const { name, email, message } = await req.json(); // Validate input if (!name || !email || !message) { return NextResponse.json( { error: 'Name, email and message are required' }, { status: 400 } ); } // Here you would typically send this data to your email service or database // For example, using a service like SendGrid, Mailchimp, etc. // For demonstration, we'll just log it console.log('Contact form submission:', { name, email, message }); // Return success response return NextResponse.json( { success: true, message: 'Message sent successfully' }, { status: 200 } ); } catch (error) { console.error('Error in contact API:', error); return NextResponse.json( { error: 'Failed to send message' }, { status: 500 } ); } }

SpotifyTokenAPI.code: import { NextResponse } from 'next/server'; import { spotifyConfig } from '@/shared/utils/config'; export async function GET() { try { // Create token request const params = new URLSearchParams(); params.append('grant_type', 'client_credentials'); // Encode client ID and secret for basic auth const authHeader = Buffer.from( `${spotifyConfig.clientId}:${spotifyConfig.clientSecret}` ).toString('base64'); // Make the request to Spotify API const response = await fetch('https://accounts.spotify.com/api/token', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Authorization': `Basic ${authHeader}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded', }, body: params }); const data = await response.json(); // Return the access token if (data.access_token) { return NextResponse.json({ access_token: data.access_token }); } else { return NextResponse.json( { error: 'Failed to obtain access token' }, { status: 400 } ); } } catch (error) { console.error('Error getting Spotify token:', error); return NextResponse.json( { error: 'Error getting Spotify token' }, { status: 500 } ); } }

config.code: export const config = { // API configuration api: { spotifyBaseUrl: 'https://api.spotify.com/v1', youtubeBaseUrl: 'https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3', }, // Feature flags features: { enableAIGeneration: true, enableCollaboration: true, enableAnalytics: true, }, // Limits and quotas limits: { maxProjects: 10, maxSoundGenerationsPerDay: 50, maxCollaboratorsPerProject: 5, }, // UI settings ui: { theme: { primary: '#8A2BE2', // BlueViolet secondary: '#3A86FF', accent: '#FF006E', background: '#121212', }, animations: { enableAnimations: true, }, }, }; export const spotifyConfig = { clientId: process.env.SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID || '', clientSecret: process.env.SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET || '', }; export default config;

utils.code: import { type ClassValue, clsx } from 'clsx'; import { twMerge } from 'tailwind-merge'; export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) { return twMerge(clsx(inputs)); } export function formatDate(date: Date): string { return new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric', }).format(date); } export function truncateText(text: string, maxLength: number): string { if (text.length <= maxLength) return text; return text.slice(0, maxLength) + '...'; }

Artist.code: export interface Artist { id: string; name: string; genres: string[]; imageUrl: string; popularity: number; followers: number; }

Track.code: export interface Track { id: string; title: string; artistName: string; albumName: string; duration: number; previewUrl: string; }

Project.code: export interface Project { id: string; name: string; description: string; createdAt: Date; updatedAt: Date; tracks: Track[]; }

User.code: export interface User { id: string; name: string; email: string; imageUrl?: string; projects: Project[]; }

HomePage.code: export default function HomePage() { return ( <main className="flex min-h-screen flex-col items-center justify-between"> <Hero /> <About /> <Services /> <TeamSection /> <TrendingArtists /> <Contact /> <Newsletter /> </main> ); }
